channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Phoenix Petroleum clarifies lifetime fuel incentive offer for Hidilyn Diaz
item.description: Phoenix Petroleum has publicly addressed the topic of offering a 'lifetime fuel incentive' to Hidilyn Diaz, the Olympic gold medalist in weightlifting. The company clarified that the incentive is part...

item.title: Experts Recommend Peace Education and Inclusive Governance to Reduce Violence in Nigeria
item.description: Scholars and peacebuilding experts for Nigeria don yan say make we strengthen institutional frameworks, include everybody for governance, and mix traditional conflict resolution systems with governmen...

item.title: Musician Chintan Kalra to perform and conduct ukulele workshop in Bengaluru
item.description: New Delhi-based musician Chintan Kalra, known for his versatility across around 20 musical instruments, is bringing his unique Ukulelisten series to Bengaluru this weekend. Though initially considerin...

item.title: Potential Layoffs and Temporary Suspensions Loom in Spain's Henares Corridor Logistics Hub Amid Iran War and Hormuz Disruptions
item.description: An article from El Periódico de la Energía highlighted the severe risks to Spanish industry from the ongoing war against Iran, which has disrupted the Strait of Hormuz—a critical chokepoint for about ...

item.title: Iranian Naval Mines in the Strait of Hormuz Pose Major Challenges for Western Forces
item.description: Iran is reportedly prepared to use sea mines to disrupt shipping through the strategic Strait of Hormuz, following U.S. and Israeli strikes on its territory. The country is estimated to possess betwee...

item.title: Nairobi Court Suspends NTSA Instant Fines System Pending Legal Review
item.description: The National Transport and Safety Authority's (NTSA) automated instant fine system has been put on hold by the Nairobi High Court until April 9, 2026. This comes after Sheria Mtaani filed a petition a...

item.title: Governor Fubara Assures Completion of Port Harcourt Ring Road by October 2026
item.description: Di Governor of Rivers State, Siminalayi Fubara, don assure say di ongoing Port Harcourt Ring Road go ready by October dis year. Dis promise don ginger hope among Rivers people wey don dey suffer disru...

item.title: Prince Harry and Meghan Markle to Attend High-Priced VIP Engagements in Australia
item.description: Prince Harry and Meghan, Duchess of Sussex, are scheduled to visit Australia in mid-April, marking their first trip since their official post-wedding tour in 2018. The visit includes a series of high-...

item.title: Surace Family Targets First Group 1 Win with Lazzura in Coolmore Classic
item.description: After several challenging years in the racing industry, the Surace family, operating under B2B Thoroughbreds, are enjoying a strong run with stakes winners Generosity and Hidrix. Their ultimate goal r...

item.title: Government Commits to Investigating October 29 Incidents and Maintaining National Stability
item.description: President Samia Suluhu Hassan has assured that the government of Tanzania is committed to properly investigating the events of October 29, 2025, following unrest after the general elections. She empha...

item.title: Delhi fire at Uttam Nagar fish market falsely linked to drone facility attack
item.description: A recent social media post went viral claiming that a joint Indian-Israeli drone manufacturing centre in Delhi was attacked, resulting in a massive explosion and casualties. The post included a video ...

item.title: Shibiri testifies he never discussed police operations with Matlala despite call evidence
item.description: Suspended organised crime head, Maj-Gen. Richard Shibiri, testified before the Madlanga Commission on Wednesday regarding his interactions with alleged tycoon Vusimuzi “Cat” Matlala. Shibiri denied ev...

item.title: A daughter's reflection on her mother's enduring wisdom and loving guidance
item.description: In this heartfelt personal essay, the author reflects on the profound and timeless love she receives from her mother, Linda, despite living in a different country for most of her adult life. A cherish...

item.title: AI-powered scams target authors with fake reviews and offers
item.description: Walter Marsh, an Adelaide-based journalist and author, has experienced a surge of AI-driven scam emails shortly after releasing his latest book. These emails, sent from accounts posing as readers, rev...

item.title: Kenyan Man Sentenced to Nine Years for Forging Documents and Exporting Wildlife Products
item.description: Nairobi — Peter Omwangala Atepe has been sentenced to nine years in prison for illegally exporting wildlife products and forging official wildlife documents. The ruling came from Principal Magistrate ...

item.title: Clinical Trial Finds Sulthiame Reduces Breathing Pauses in Sleep Apnea Patients
item.description: A European clinical trial led in part by the University of Gothenburg has found that the drug sulthiame can significantly reduce breathing interruptions in people with moderate to severe obstructive s...

item.title: DOE Investigates Gas Stations for Excessive Fuel Price Hikes
item.description: The Department of Energy (DOE) is currently investigating around 500 complaints from consumers regarding fuel retailers allegedly increasing gasoline and diesel prices beyond allowed limits amid globa...

item.title: DepEd addresses technical issues in Unified Science High School pilot exam
item.description: The Department of Education (DepEd) has acknowledged technical glitches that occurred during the pilot run of the Unified Science High School Admission Test (USHAT). According to DepEd, some examinees...

item.title: Bunge Girls Secondary School Empowers Students with Clean Cooking Energy Club
item.description: For real, life at Bunge Girls Secondary School in Dodoma has changed proper. Before, the kitchen smoke from firewood used to choke everybody and cooks like Maria Joseph would finish their shift with s...

item.title: Lachie Neale’s AFL future unclear as potential move to WA faces new club interest
item.description: Brisbane Lions midfielder Lachie Neale’s future is in flux following a highly publicised personal scandal and his recent split from Jules Neale. The 31-year-old, a two-time Brownlow medallist and back...
